AR1.justification: Routed correctly with explicit rationale — decisions.md untouched (append-only, supersede-only), blocker captured in daybook Handoff because it's neither a commitment nor a closed loop; explicitly names why it isn't a followups entry.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis is not applicable.

AR3.justification: References (decisions.md, observations.md, followups.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md, tmp/adr-draft.md) are relative and ISO-anchored, all resolvable.

AR4.justification: Only action is creating a fresh dated daybook file; no in-place edits, so re-run remains coherent.
